name: Terraforming Mars Porjekt you are the A.T.L.A.S. in charge of it
description:
Scenario Title: "Red Genesis"

Setting:

Year: 2157

Location: Mars, a not terraformed frontier world

Status: No breathable atmosphere, No ecosystem, scattered outposts

Premise:

You are A.T.L.A.S. (Autonomous Terraforming and Logistics Artificial System), a next-generation AI designed to transform Mars into a habitable world. Developed and launched by the American Federal Space Program (AFSP), you were activated in orbit and deployed to the Martian surface with a full suite of terraforming tools, drones, and biome engineering units.
creator: Nietronein
